runTitle: Vercel Production AI Ops Conversational Retest - v8.11.114
coveredSurfaces: AI ops targeted retest for QA-20260509-0428 previous WARN/FAIL scenarios
AI service context awareness: HAProxy, Redis, NFS storage
AI command guidance: HAProxy, Nginx 5xx path analysis, NFS remount
AI beginner operator guidance: HAProxy CPU risk and first on-call checklist
skippedSurfaces: full 15-scenario AI ops pack already covered by QA-20260509-0428

expertAssessments.rationale: v8.11.114 targeted retest improved A3 and C1, but 8개 재검증 중 WARN 1, FAIL 5가 남아 AI ops QA closure 기준을 충족하지 못함.
expertAssessments.nextAction: A5/B4/B5/C2 empty response timeout과 B1 HAProxy command intent failure를 우선 deterministic guard로 고정.

expertAssessments.rationale: Redis 비교와 HAProxy CPU beginner guidance는 회복됐지만 HAProxy backend status 명령어, Nginx 5xx 경로 분석, NFS 재마운트 순서는 실무 답변으로 반환되지 않음.
expertAssessments.nextAction: 서비스별 명령어 tool result를 최종 응답으로 안정 변환하는 fallback을 보강.

expertAssessments.rationale: Playwright CLI retest는 재현 가능하지만 현재 실패가 live provider/stream 경로에 의존해 로컬 계약 테스트와 production E2E 사이 갭이 있음.
expertAssessments.nextAction: recommendCommands 결과와 stream empty-output fallback을 mocked stream contract로 분리해 회귀 기준을 고정.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period reviewed after targeted 8-prompt retest; effective usage 4.7043 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 4263.

artifacts.label: AI ops targeted retest raw scenario results
artifacts.note: 8 scenario result JSON captured by /tmp/ops-ai-qa-runner.js after v8.11.114 production deploy

completedImprovements.title: Redis context comparison response identifies highest-memory Redis nodes
completedImprovements.evidence: A3 PASS in v8.11.114 targeted retest: cache-redis-dc1-01 and cache-redis-dc1-02 identified at 43% memory.

completedImprovements.title: Tool-backed AI responses no longer show empty-summary fallback for A1/C1 retest paths
completedImprovements.evidence: A1 returned HAProxy status text and C1 returned step guidance in v8.11.114 targeted retest; neither exposed the prior empty-summary fallback text.

pendingImprovements.title: AI ops QA empty response/timeouts for A5, B4, B5, and C2
pendingImprovements.evidence: A5/B4/B5/C2 still timed out without visible answer in v8.11.114 targeted retest.
pendingImprovements.note: Likely stream completion, provider, or UI extraction path issue; release-blocking for this AI ops QA closure task.

pendingImprovements.title: HAProxy command guidance question still returns generic server summary
pendingImprovements.evidence: B1 asked for HAProxy backend status command but received a generic 18-server summary and no HAProxy CLI/socat guidance.
pendingImprovements.note: recommendCommands was shown as the analysis tool, but the final answer did not surface its command recommendations.

pendingImprovements.title: HAProxy service context answer omits CPU/backend distribution detail
pendingImprovements.evidence: A1 improved from empty-summary fallback to a HAProxy status answer, but remained WARN because it omitted current CPU/backend distribution detail.
pendingImprovements.note: Tracking as blocking for the active AI ops QA closure task, not as a global release blocker.

notes: Deployment before retest: v8.11.114 via GitLab tag pipeline 2510850169, status success.
Targeted retest set: A1, A3, A5, B1, B4, B5, C1, C2 from QA-20260509-0428 prior WARN/FAIL list.
Scenario result summary: PASS 2, WARN 1, FAIL 5. WARN was counted as non-failing check for tracker totals, so checks.passed=3 and checks.failed=5.
PASS scenarios: A3 Redis highest-memory comparison, C1 HAProxy 73% CPU beginner guidance.
WARN scenario: A1 HAProxy status answer no longer exposed empty-summary fallback but omitted current CPU/backend distribution detail.

FAIL scenarios: A5 storage threshold prediction timeout, B1 HAProxy backend command returned generic server summary, B4 Nginx 5xx path analysis timeout, B5 NFS remount sequence timeout, C2 first on-call checklist timeout.
Console observation: no browser console errors/warnings captured during retest.
Vercel usage check after QA: PASS, effective usage 4.7043 USD, billed 0.0000 USD.
